name: extract_document_details
description: Extract structured metadata from a legal document including type, parties, key terms, and date. Give the document a name according to a standardized naming convention.

name_of_document.description: Name of file according to a standardized naming convention

document_type.description: The type of document e.g. NDA, MSA, Agreement, Contract

parties.description: List of names of the parties involved in the document

key_terms.description: List of important terms or clauses found in the document

date.description: The date of the document in YYYY-MM-DD format if possible

short_description.description: A one line summary of what this document is about

confidence.description: Confidence score between 0 and 1 on the accuracy of the extraction
